title: Detail Engineering Design
subheadline: Precision engineering blueprints for flawless execution.
description: Precise engineering design and CAD drafting.
fullDescription: Our detailed engineering design services provide accurate blueprints, 3D models, and comprehensive technical specifications necessary for flawless construction and execution.
painPoints: Vague or inaccurate engineering designs lead to costly change orders, construction delays, and compromised structural integrity. Clients need absolute precision to transition smoothly to the construction phase.
approach: We leverage advanced 3D modeling and finite element analysis to produce constructible, optimized designs. Every drawing undergoes rigorous peer review to ensure compliance with stringent international codes.
process: Peer Review & IFC (Issued for Construction) Release

caseStudy.title: Lower Piluwa HPP
caseStudy.description: Compact hydropower facility delivering clean energy through efficient detailed project reporting and design. Demonstrates viability of micro-hydropower for rural electrification.

testimonial.quote: The level of detail in CEC's construction drawings meant zero change orders during the civil works phase. Highly recommended.
testimonial.author: Sunil Thapa
testimonial.title: Project Director
